headline: Eversource Energy Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Eversource Energy has underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts are cautious about the stock’s prospects.

raw.headline: Eversource Energy Stock: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
raw.summary: Eversource Energy has underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts are cautious about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Eversource CEO: ‘We are resisting data centers’
summary: Data centers are of “no value to our residential customer — actually, any customer,” said Eversource Energy CEO Joe Nolan. “It's only going to drive up the price of energy.”

raw.headline: Eversource CEO: ‘We are resisting data centers’
raw.summary: Data centers are of “no value to our residential customer — actually, any customer,” said Eversource Energy CEO Joe Nolan. “It's only going to drive up the price of energy.”

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Eversource Energy, Raises Price Target to $75
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Shahriar Pourreza   maintains Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $74 to $75.
